name: docx_template_fill
description: Fill a mustache-style template — placeholders, loops, conditions — with data and return the new doc_id. Placeholders fragmented across split runs are coalesced before matching; an empty 'unfilled' list in the result is the success check.

data.description: Merge data: scalars fill placeholders, arrays expand loops, booleans drive conditions.

strict.description: Fail with placeholder_unfilled instead of leaving placeholders blank when data is missing.
